---
title: "TRSE units: MEGA65"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE

# MEGA65

These paths are relative to `units/MEGA65/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `gfx/gfx`
- `memory`
- `screen`
- `tables/luminosities`
